ItacPersonItem.Notes: Reviews of his publication Il Panteon in Pindo eretto gia` e consegrato ai Santi dell`anno giovanile Musa divota dell`Ascoso Accademico Gelato... (Bologna, Pisarri, 1691) - not in BL collections - is in Giornale de` Letterati (Modena, 1692), and Synopsis biblica alias Diarium Literatorum (Parmae, Pazzoni-Monti), p. 17. Latest contribution on Malvasia is Perini, `Il marinismo di Malvasia`, in Letteratura e arte (2005).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
